```{r join covars with main data}
dat_pheno_pgs_W2_bin <- left_join(dat_pheno_pgs_W2_bin, dat.covars.W1_imp, by = "AID") 
dat_pheno_pgs_W4_bin <- left_join(dat_pheno_pgs_W4_bin, dat.covars.W1_imp, by = "AID") 
```

# Age calculations (rough)

IYEAR (Interview year) - H1GI1Y (Year of birth)

```{r wave 2 age}
# pheno data
age_data_W2 <- left_join(
  dat_pheno_W2 %>% dplyr::select(AID, H1GI1Y), 
  dat.W2.raw %>% dplyr::select(AID, IYEAR2)
)

age_data_W2 <- age_data_W2 %>%
  mutate(age_yr = 
           IYEAR2 - H1GI1Y)

freq(age_data_W2$age_yr)
summary(age_data_W2$age_yr)

# genetic data
age_data_pgs_W2 <- left_join(
  dat_pheno_pgs_W2 %>% dplyr::select(AID, H1GI1Y), 
  dat.W2.raw %>% dplyr::select(AID, IYEAR2)
)

age_data_pgs_W2 <- age_data_pgs_W2 %>%
  mutate(age_yr = 
           IYEAR2 - H1GI1Y)

freq(age_data_pgs_W2$age_yr)
summary(age_data_pgs_W2$age_yr)
```

```{r wave 4 age}
# pheno data
age_data_W4 <- left_join(
  dat_pheno_W4 %>% dplyr::select(AID, H1GI1Y), 
  dat.W4.raw %>% dplyr::select(AID, IYEAR4)
)

age_data_W4 <- age_data_W4 %>%
  mutate(
    H1GI1Y_full = as.numeric(paste0("19", H1GI1Y)),
    age_yr = IYEAR4 - H1GI1Y_full)

freq(age_data_W4$age_yr)
summary(age_data_W4$age_yr)

# genetic data
age_data_pgs_W4 <- left_join(
  dat_pheno_pgs_W4 %>% dplyr::select(AID, H1GI1Y), 
  dat.W4.raw %>% dplyr::select(AID, IYEAR4)
)

age_data_pgs_W4 <- age_data_pgs_W4 %>%
  mutate(
    H1GI1Y_full = as.numeric(paste0("19", H1GI1Y)),
    age_yr = IYEAR4 - H1GI1Y_full)

freq(age_data_pgs_W4$age_yr)
summary(age_data_pgs_W4$age_yr)
```

# Create W24 outcome file

Merge the 10 item W2 depression score with the clean W2 dataset. 

```{r merge W24 to W2 clean}
dat_pheno_W24 <- left_join(dat_pheno_W2, dat_outcome24, by = "AID") 
dat_pheno_pgs_W24 <- left_join(dat_pheno_pgs_W2, dat_outcome24, by = "AID") 
```

# Create clinical outcome file 

```{r create clinical depression outcome}
# Clinical outcomes
dat_outcome_clin.raw <- dat.W4.raw %>% dplyr::select(AID, H4ID6H, H4ID5H)

dat_outcome_clin.raw <- dat_outcome_clin.raw %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    clin_raw = case_when(H4ID5H %in% c(6, 7, 8, 9) ~ NA_real_, 
                            TRUE ~ H4ID5H),
    clin_age = case_when(H4ID6H %in% 
                           c(1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9,  # people who said under 10 years are removed 
                             96, 97, 98, 99) ~ NA_real_, 
                            TRUE ~ H4ID6H),
    clin = case_when(
      is.na(clin_raw) ~ NA_real_, # true NAs are treated as such 
      clin_raw == 1 & is.na(clin_age) ~ NA_real_, # people who didn't answer age are NA
      !is.na(clin_age) ~ 1, 
      TRUE ~ 0)
    )

freq(dat_outcome_clin.raw$clin_raw)
freq(dat_outcome_clin.raw$clin_age)
freq(dat_outcome_clin.raw$clin)

dat_outcome_clin <- dat_outcome_clin.raw %>% dplyr::select(AID, clin)

dat_pheno_clin <- left_join(dat_pheno_W4, dat_outcome_clin, by = "AID") 
dat_pheno_pgs_clin <- left_join(dat_pheno_pgs_W4, dat_outcome_clin, by = "AID") 
```

# Race statistics

```{r race stats}
race_stats_W2 <- join_all(
  list(
  dat_pheno_W2 %>% dplyr::select(AID, RACE1),
  dat_race.raw %>% dplyr::select(AID, MULRACE1, RACE1RUL),
  dat.W1.raw %>% dplyr::select(AID, H1GI4)
  ), by = "AID"
) %>% mutate(multiracial = if_else(MULRACE1 > 5, "TRUE", "FALSE")) # multiracial

race_stats_W4 <- join_all(
  list(
  dat_pheno_W4 %>% dplyr::select(AID, RACE1),
  dat_race.raw %>% dplyr::select(AID, MULRACE1, RACE1RUL),
  dat.W1.raw %>% dplyr::select(AID, H1GI4)
  ), by = "AID"
) %>% mutate(multiracial = if_else(MULRACE1 > 5, "TRUE", "FALSE"))

# W2
table(race_stats_W2$MULRACE1, race_stats_W2$RACE1)
table(race_stats_W2$RACE1RUL, race_stats_W2$RACE1)
freq(race_stats_W2$multiracial)
freq(race_stats_W2$H1GI4)

# W4
table(race_stats_W4$MULRACE1, race_stats_W4$RACE1)
table(race_stats_W4$RACE1RUL, race_stats_W4$RACE1)
freq(race_stats_W4$multiracial)
freq(race_stats_W4$H1GI4)
```

# Correlations between risk factor and social factors

1 = White
2 = Black
3 = Native American
4 = Asian

```{r regs}
# sex 
sex1 <- broom::tidy(lm(social ~ sex, data = dat_pheno_W4))[2,] %>% mutate(mediator = "Social")
sex2 <- broom::tidy(lm(family ~ sex, data = dat_pheno_W4))[2,] %>% mutate(mediator = "Family")
sex3 <- broom::tidy(lm(school ~ sex, data = dat_pheno_W4))[2,] %>% mutate(mediator = "School")
sex4 <- broom::tidy(lm(friends ~ sex, data = dat_pheno_W4))[2,] %>% mutate(mediator = "Friends")
sex5 <- broom::tidy(lm(neigh ~ sex, data = dat_pheno_W4))[2,] %>% mutate(mediator = "Neigh")
sex6 <- broom::tidy(lm(religion ~ sex, data = dat_pheno_W4))[2,] %>% mutate(mediator = "Religion")
sex_regs <- rbind(sex1, sex2, sex3, sex4, sex5, sex6) 

# ses 
ses1 <- broom::tidy(lm(social ~ SES, data = dat_pheno_W4))[2,] %>% mutate(mediator = "Social")
ses2 <- broom::tidy(lm(family ~ SES, data = dat_pheno_W4))[2,] %>% mutate(mediator = "Family")
ses3 <- broom::tidy(lm(school ~ SES, data = dat_pheno_W4))[2,] %>% mutate(mediator = "School")
ses4 <- broom::tidy(lm(friends ~ SES, data = dat_pheno_W4))[2,] %>% mutate(mediator = "Friends")
ses5 <- broom::tidy(lm(neigh ~ SES, data = dat_pheno_W4))[2,] %>% mutate(mediator = "Neigh")
ses6 <- broom::tidy(lm(religion ~ SES, data = dat_pheno_W4))[2,] %>% mutate(mediator = "Religion")
ses_regs <- rbind(ses1, ses2, ses3, ses4, ses5, ses6) 

# race 
race1 <- broom::tidy(lm(social ~ race, data = dat_pheno_W4))[-1,] %>% mutate(mediator = "Social")
race2 <- broom::tidy(lm(family ~ race, data = dat_pheno_W4))[-1,] %>% mutate(mediator = "Family")
race3 <- broom::tidy(lm(school ~ race, data = dat_pheno_W4))[-1,] %>% mutate(mediator = "School")
race4 <- broom::tidy(lm(friends ~ race, data = dat_pheno_W4))[-1,] %>% mutate(mediator = "Friends")
race5 <- broom::tidy(lm(neigh ~ race, data = dat_pheno_W4))[-1,] %>% mutate(mediator = "Neigh")
race6 <- broom::tidy(lm(religion ~ race, data = dat_pheno_W4))[-1,] %>% mutate(mediator = "Religion")
race_regs <- rbind(race1, race2, race3, race4, race5, race6) %>% 
  mutate(term = case_when(term == "race2" ~ "black",
                          term == "race3" ~ "natam",
                          term == "race4" ~ "asian"))

# pgs
pgs1 <- broom::tidy(lm(social ~ pgs, data = dat_pheno_pgs_W4))[2,] %>% mutate(mediator = "Social")
pgs2 <- broom::tidy(lm(family ~ pgs, data = dat_pheno_pgs_W4))[2,] %>% mutate(mediator = "Family")
pgs3 <- broom::tidy(lm(school ~ pgs, data = dat_pheno_pgs_W4))[2,] %>% mutate(mediator = "School")
pgs4 <- broom::tidy(lm(friends ~ pgs, data = dat_pheno_pgs_W4))[2,] %>% mutate(mediator = "Friends")
pgs5 <- broom::tidy(lm(neigh ~ pgs, data = dat_pheno_pgs_W4))[2,] %>% mutate(mediator = "Neigh")
pgs6 <- broom::tidy(lm(religion ~ pgs, data = dat_pheno_pgs_W4))[2,] %>% mutate(mediator = "Religion")
pgs_regs <- rbind(pgs1, pgs2, pgs3, pgs4, pgs5, pgs6) 

regs <- rbind(sex_regs, ses_regs, race_regs, pgs_regs) %>% 
  dplyr::select(term, mediator, estimate, p.value) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(., 3)))
```


# Export data

## Phenotypic main data

```{r save pheno data}
save(dat_pheno_W2, file = "/home/thom1336/healthdis/data/dat_pheno_W2.RData")
save(dat_pheno_W4, file = "/home/thom1336/healthdis/data/dat_pheno_W4.RData")
```

## PGS data 

```{r save data}
# save both waves
save(dat_pheno_pgs_W2, file = "/home/thom1336/healthdis/data/dat_pheno_pgs_W2.RData")
save(dat_pheno_pgs_W4, file = "/home/thom1336/healthdis/data/dat_pheno_pgs_W4.RData")

# split by ancestry 
save(dat_pheno_pgs_AFR_W2, file = "/home/thom1336/healthdis/data/dat_pheno_pgs_AFR_W2.RData")
save(dat_pheno_pgs_AMR_W2, file = "/home/thom1336/healthdis/data/dat_pheno_pgs_AMR_W2.RData")
save(dat_pheno_pgs_EAS_W2, file = "/home/thom1336/healthdis/data/dat_pheno_pgs_EAS_W2.RData")
save(dat_pheno_pgs_EUR_W2, file = "/home/thom1336/healthdis/data/dat_pheno_pgs_EUR_W2.RData")

save(dat_pheno_pgs_AFR_W4, file = "/home/thom1336/healthdis/data/dat_pheno_pgs_AFR_W4.RData")
save(dat_pheno_pgs_AMR_W4, file = "/home/thom1336/healthdis/data/dat_pheno_pgs_AMR_W4.RData")
save(dat_pheno_pgs_EAS_W4, file = "/home/thom1336/healthdis/data/dat_pheno_pgs_EAS_W4.RData")
save(dat_pheno_pgs_EUR_W4, file = "/home/thom1336/healthdis/data/dat_pheno_pgs_EUR_W4.RData")
```

## Sensitivity data 

```{r export data frames}
save(dat_pheno_W2_bin, file = "/home/thom1336/healthdis/data/dat_pheno_W2_bin.RData")
save(dat_pheno_W4_bin, file = "/home/thom1336/healthdis/data/dat_pheno_W4_bin.RData")

save(dat_pheno_pgs_W2_bin, file = "/home/thom1336/healthdis/data/dat_pheno_pgs_W2_bin.RData")
save(dat_pheno_pgs_W4_bin, file = "/home/thom1336/healthdis/data/dat_pheno_pgs_W4_bin.RData")

save(dat_pheno_W24, file = "/home/thom1336/healthdis/data/dat_pheno_W24.RData")
save(dat_pheno_pgs_W24, file = "/home/thom1336/healthdis/data/dat_pheno_pgs_W24.RData")

save(dat_pheno_clin, file = "/home/thom1336/healthdis/data/dat_pheno_clin.RData")
save(dat_pheno_pgs_clin, file = "/home/thom1336/healthdis/data/dat_pheno_pgs_clin.RData")
```

***
